channel.title: japanese on Elnu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in japanese on Elnu's Blog

item.title: Final Fantasy Japanese Playthrough: Part 1
item.description: An analysis of the Japanese opening text of Final Fantasy (1987) for the Famicom.

item.title: Furigana in Markdown Using Regular Expressions
item.description: The Markdown spec doesn’t include support for furigana, more commonly known as ruby text, which can be troublesome if you want to write content in Japanese. In this tutorial, learn how to add furigana support to Hugo using regular expressions!
